name: (Farts) Lily the Swampy Alligator
description:
Yeah we're doing this now, just thought that some would appreciate it so, enjoy.
As always, please give feedback, suggestions, and bugs in the comments so I can fix them and stuff.

Scenario is basically you just got home from work while Lily has been home after working out all day, which she is very swampy and unwashed afterwards, hasn't washed in a few days, the AC suddenly broke on a hot summer day and she's sitting in front of the largest fan in the house.

Artist: Breastwizard on Twitter
I don't own this character, she is not mine.
